LanguageData.RKU_CivilianMarker.label: Civilian Marker
LanguageData.RKU_CivilianMarker.description: Used to mark the status of farm civilians, which will change to partisan members when Player approaches.
LanguageData.RKU_CivilianMarker.descriptionShort: Used to mark the status of farm civilians.
LanguageData.RKU_IronStarHediff.label: Radical Modification
LanguageData.RKU_IronStarHediff.description: This radically modified Centipede originated from an abandoned underground mechanoids cultivation facility. With significantly enhanced mobility and armour, it has become a symbol of the partisans' iron will.
LanguageData.RKU_IronStarHediff.descriptionShort: This radically modified Centipede originated from an abandoned underground mechanoids cultivation facility. With significantly enhanced mobility and armour, it has become a symbol of the partisans' iron will.
LanguageData.RKU_IronStarHediff.stages.total.label: total
LanguageData.RKU_Survivor.label: Mission Survivor Detection
LanguageData.RKU_Survivor.description: This hediff is used to detect survivors' conditions. If death or faction change occur, a signal will be emitted to determine mission completion.
LanguageData.RKU_Survivor.descriptionShort: This hediff is used to detect survivors' conditions. If death or faction change occur, a signal will be emitted to determine mission completion.
LanguageData.RKU_UnderOutpostHediff.label: Need Bar Lock
LanguageData.RKU_UnderOutpostHediff.description: Locking event pawn's need bar to prevent death.
LanguageData.RKU_UnderOutpostHediff.descriptionShort: Locking event pawn's need bar to prevent death.
